introSection: Crazy Twister (Hebrew: קרייזי טוויסטר ) is a steel roller coaster located at Luna Park Tel Aviv in Tel Aviv, Tel Aviv, Israel.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Yellow track with white supports. The ride is tall, inclduding the height of a car filled with passengers at the highest point.

fullText:
Crazy Twister (Hebrew: קרייזי טוויסטר ) is a steel roller coaster located at Luna Park Tel Aviv in Tel Aviv, Tel Aviv, Israel.

Yellow track with white supports. The ride is tall, inclduding the height of a car filled with passengers at the highest point.
